creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #33)
Yes, as mentioned in comment 29, these fixes have been available for a long time. But some people kept reporting that it still crashed for them, so nothing has moved since.

I still believe that it was fixed, but maybe I should have bumped the port revision more aggressively to force rebuilds on all sides.

Then again, openjdk8 is obsolete now, so there is not much use in kicking the almost-dead horse. :)
